samples.xml_description:
<module id="serial2parallel">
    <description>Serial-to-Parallel Conversion Circuit</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="din_serial">Serial input data.</input>
        <input id="din_valid">Validity signal for input data.</input>
        <output id="dout_parallel" width_description="[7:0]">Parallel output data (8 bits wide).</output>
        <output id="dout_valid">Validity signal for the output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state id="IDLE">Idle state.</state>
        <state id="RECEIVE">Receiving state.</state>
        <state id="OUTPUT">Output state.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="cnt" width_description="[3:0]">Counter to keep track of the number of received serial input data bits.</reg>
        <reg id="valid" width_description="[0:0]">Valid signal for the output data.</reg>
        <reg id="data" width_description="[7:0]">Data register to store the received serial input data.</reg>
        
        // Sequential logic block triggered on the positive edge of the clock or negative edge of the reset signal
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                cnt <= 4'd0;
                valid <= 1'b0;
                data <= 8'd0;
            end else begin
                case(cnt)
                    4'd0: begin
                        if(din_valid == 1'b1) begin
                            cnt <= cnt + 4'd1;
                            data[7-cnt] <= din_serial;
                        end
                    end
                    4'd1: begin
                        if(din_valid == 1'b1) begin
                            cnt <= cnt + 4'd1;
                            data[7-cnt] <= din_serial;
                        end
                    end
                    4'd2: begin
                        if(din_valid == 1'b1) begin
                            cnt <= cnt + 4'd1;
                            data[7-cnt] <= din_serial;
                        end
                    end
                    4'd3: begin
                        if(din_valid == 1'b1) begin
                            cnt <= cnt + 4'd1;
                            data[7-cnt] <= din_serial;
                        end
                    end
                    4'd4: begin
                        if(din_valid == 1'b1) begin
                            cnt <= cnt + 4'd1;
                            data[7-cnt] <= din_serial;
                        end
                    end
                    4'd5: begin
                        if(din_valid == 1'b1) begin
                            cnt <= cnt + 4'd1;
                            data[7-cnt] <= din_serial;
                        end
                    end
                    4'd6: begin
                        if(din_valid == 1'b1) begin
                            cnt <= cnt + 4'd1;
                            data[7-cnt] <= din_serial;
                        end
                    end
                    4'd7: begin
                        if(din_valid == 1'b1) begin
                            cnt <= cnt + 4'd1;
                            data[7-cnt] <= din_serial;
                        end
                    end
                    default: begin
                        cnt <= 4'd0;
                        valid <= 1'b1;
                    end
                endcase
            end
        end
        
        // Assign statements to connect the internal signals to the output ports
        assign dout_parallel = data;
        assign dout_valid = valid;
    </logic_description>
</module>
